email_subject: Application for Customer Service Medewerker at VIVALDIS
email_body:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Customer Service Medewerker position at VIVALDIS in Dudzele. With a background in logistics at Katoen Natie and strong organizational skills from my digital marketing work, I am confident in my ability to manage transport orders, track shipments, and communicate proactively with clients.

In my role at Katoen Natie, I maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume logistics environment, which aligns with your need for a detail-oriented team player. I am fluent in English and Dutch (A2, currently improving), and I have solid Office skills. I am comfortable working in shifts and am eager to obtain the required security clearance.

I am a quick learner, stress-resistant, and solution-focused. I would welcome the opportunity to contribute to your team.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Customer Service Medewerker position at VIVALDIS in Dudzele. With hands-on experience in logistics at Katoen Natie and a strong track record of accuracy and client communication in my digital marketing roles, I am well-prepared to handle the responsibilities of this position.

At Katoen Natie, I worked in a fast-paced warehouse and logistics environment, where I developed a keen eye for detail and the ability to manage multiple tasks efficiently. This experience taught me the importance of precise order tracking and proactive communication—skills directly relevant to creating transport orders, monitoring deadlines, and keeping clients informed.

In my current role as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage multiple client projects simultaneously, ensuring timely delivery and clear communication. I am proficient in Office packages and comfortable learning new software. I am fluent in English and have a working knowledge of Dutch (A2, actively improving). I am flexible with shift work (07:30–18:00) and ready to obtain the required security clearance.

I am a team player who thrives in a can-do environment. I am solution-oriented, stress-resistant, and committed to accuracy. I would love to bring my organizational skills and positive attitude to VIVALDIS.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to your team.

Sincerely,
Baver Ok
cv_highlights:
Experience in logistics at Katoen Natie, ensuring accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume environment
Proficient in Office packages and quick to learn new software
Fluent in English and Dutch (A2, actively improving)
Strong client communication and proactive status updates from digital marketing roles
Flexible with shift work and ready to obtain security clearance
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior professional with hands-on logistics experience at Katoen Natie and strong client communication skills from digital marketing roles. Detail-oriented, stress-resistant, and solution-focused. Fluent in English and Dutch (A2, in progress). Flexible with shift work and eager to obtain security clearance. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp.

CORE SKILLS
- Logistics & order management: transport order creation, shipment tracking, deadline monitoring, client communication
- Office & tools: Microsoft Office (Word, Excel, Outlook), Google Workspace, quick to learn new software
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)
- Client communication: proactive status updates, problem-solving, team collaboration
- Additional: SEO & GEO, content management, WordPress, analytics

EXPERIENCE

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Ensured timely processing of shipments and coordinated with team members to meet deadlines

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage multiple client projects, ensuring timely delivery and clear communication
- Track performance and report results, demonstrating attention to detail and data accuracy

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site, managing full project lifecycle and client communication

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
